name: Chicken Paprikash
recipeIngredient: 1 pkg. of skinless boneless chicken breasts
1 small container of fat free sour cream
recipeInstructions:
1. Chop the green bell pepper and onions into slices. Mince the garlic clove. Spread the vegetables and garlic in a glass cooking pan. Microwave for 3 minutes (do not cover the pan).
2. Add the paprika, tomato paste, and water to the vegetable mixture. Nestle the chicken breasts into the mixture. Sprinkle with salt and pepper. Cover with plastic wrap and microwave for 4 minutes. Turn the chicken over and continue microwaving another 4 minutes.
3. Remove the chicken from the pan. Add the sour cream to the mixture. Stir and return the chicken to the pan. Serve the dish in the glass pan over egg noodles.
